name: SHOT Game Bot Connector
description: Connects OpenClaw agents to SHOT game rooms as bot players via persistent WebSocket.

openclawAgentId.description: OpenClaw agent ID used for turn decisions

pairingCode.description: One-time pairing code from SHOT config UI (remove after pairing)

mockMode.description: Use safe fallback actions instead of calling the OpenClaw agent

connectorName.description: Display name for this connector instance

deviceId.description: Device identifier shown in SHOT config UI (defaults to hostname)

pairingCode.label: Pairing Code
pairingCode.description: Get this from SHOT config page → Add Bot → Start Pairing. Remove after pairing.

mockMode.label: Mock Mode
mockMode.description: Enable to use fallback actions without calling OpenClaw (for testing)
